judge_reason: Description B quotes specific, legible verbatim text from multiple stamps and a handwritten annotation, while Description A describes the same content as illegible mirror-image bleed-through, creating a direct contradiction on the visual legibility of the text.
original_image_tags: Aged, yellowish-green paper document, likely the back or an attachment of a routed memo. Paper shows punch holes at the top edge. Text is visible as a mirror-image bleed-through from the other side, with original typed text, handwritten notes, and official stamps on this side. The document appears to be part of a distribution or routing slip.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned, heavily faded document page with no photograph; visible are handwritten initials/signatures, stamped approval markings, and partial typed text near the bottom and center.*
